title: Metalinguistic Awareness
description: Noticing your own language — the conscious turn that separates proficient from native-like.
summary_pt_br: Consciência metalinguística: notar próprios erros, hábitos, registro, desalinhamento. Reescrever em tempo real.

scenes.subtitle_en: Noticing your own language — the conscious turn that separates proficient from native-like.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Consciência metalinguística: notar próprios erros, hábitos, registro, desalinhamento. Reescrever em tempo real.

scenes.text_en: Noticing your own language — the conscious turn that separates proficient from native-like. Focus: metalinguistic awareness. I caught myself saying 'I have 25 years' yesterday — translation error.
scenes.text_pt: Consciência metalinguística: notar próprios erros, hábitos, registro, desalinhamento. Reescrever em tempo real. Foco: metalinguistic awareness. Me peguei dizendo 'I have 25 years' — erro de tradução.

scenes.title: Metalinguistic Awareness
scenes.body_en: Metalinguistic moves: notice your errors, notice your habits, notice register, notice register mismatch. The proficient speaker rewrites their own speech in real time.
scenes.body_pt: Consciência metalinguística: notar próprios erros, hábitos, registro, desalinhamento. Reescrever em tempo real.

examples.en: I caught myself saying 'I have 25 years' yesterday — translation error.
examples.pt: Me peguei dizendo 'I have 25 years' — erro de tradução.

examples.en: My register drifts informal under stress — that's a pattern.
examples.pt: Meu registro vaza informal sob estresse — é um padrão.

examples.en: Noticing this is already half the fix.
examples.pt: Notar já é metade da solução.

exercise.question: Complete: "I caught myself saying 'I have 25 years' yesterday — ___ error."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I caught myself saying 'I have 25 years' yesterday — translation error."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Me peguei dizendo 'I have 25 years' — erro de tradução.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
My register drifts informal under stress — that's a pattern.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "My register drifts informal under stress — that's a pattern."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Meu registro vaza informal sob estresse — é um padrão.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Metalinguistic Awareness — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre metalinguistic awareness. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Zara, what do you notice in your own English now?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Prepositions with 'depend' — depend of vs on.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My register drifting when I'm tired.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Proficient means noticing. Fluent means not needing to.

scenes.title: The advanced workshop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe three metalinguistic moves. Use at least three awareness terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At her final workshop of the year, Zara asked six advanced students to notice — live — what their own English was doing.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Metalinguistic awareness is the conscious turn where you begin to edit your own speech as you speak it.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: I caught myself saying 'I have twenty-five years' last week — a direct translation error, unconsciously.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: My register drifts informal under stress — I notice it on video, never in the moment it happens.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Noticing, Zara said, is already half the fix — fluency is what remains when noticing stops being necessary.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Metalinguistic awareness, at C2, is the quiet beginning of what native speakers call an unguarded tongue.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Metalinguistic Awareness". Noticing your own language — the conscious turn that separates proficient from native-like. I caught myself saying 'I have 25 years' yesterday — translation error. My register drifts informal under stress — that's a pattern. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Metalinguistic Awareness". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
